summary: Frontend-only validation of Help mega-menu + tutorial PDFs (iter 56b). All 11 verification checks pass: 4 PDFs serve HTTP 200 application/pdf, mega-menu renders with all 6 expected items (in-app + 4 PDF anchors + download-all), Escape & click-outside both dismiss the menu, in-app item still opens HelpDialog, PDF anchors have correct href/target=_blank/rel=noopener noreferrer, no console errors, no regression on other toolbar items.

checks_performed.pdf_anchor_attrs: All 4 PDF links + download-all: target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer with /docs/*.pdf hrefs

critical_code_review_comments: PDF visual sanity (orange header, footer page numbers, zebra tables, no overflow) was NOT rendered/inspected — only file size + page count verified. Main agent may want to spot-check rendered PDFs manually if visual chrome is critical, since headless inspection here only confirms valid PDF structure.

Minor: HelpMegaMenu.jsx uses window.addEventListener('mousedown') for click-outside — this fires before the help-btn's onClick. Because help-btn is inside wrapRef, that's handled correctly via contains(), but worth keeping in mind if the wrapper ever changes.
Optional polish: the download-all link points to '/docs/' which relies on directory autoindex; if hosting ever disables autoindex this will 403/404. Consider an explicit listing page.
seed_data_creation: 1 user + 1 user_sessions row inserted into test_database for cookie auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Help mega-menu lives in /app/frontend/src/components/toolbar/HelpMegaMenu.jsx and is mounted from SystemRow. All 4 tutorial PDFs at /app/frontend/public/docs/ serve correctly via the preview ingress. Cookie-based session auth pattern from test_credentials.md works for /workspace.
